title: HOGCRAFT SEASON 8
description:
Hello HoGCrafters! this is a fun vanilla++ modpack made by and played by the House of Greatsword Brawlhalla clan!

Discord.gg/HouseofGS
Message @speorg on discord if you would like to play along!
body:
Hello HoGCrafters! this is a fun vanilla++ modpack made by and played by the House of Greatsword Brawlhalla clan!

This pack is designed to bring challenge to those seeking it but be a peaceful and entertaining adventure to those who prefer to play more laid back. Perfect for a small server with friends or a bigger server made for an online community.

https://discord.com/invite/HouseofGS
Message @speorg on discord if you would like to play along!
